description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a robust wooden stock and fore-end, both with a rich brown finish and visible wood grain texture. The receiver and barrel are metallic, with a matte gray finish that suggests steel construction. The barrel is relatively short and features a tubular magazine beneath it, with a ribbed pump-action grip for manual cycling. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a single trigger. The overall design is compact, making it suitable for close-quarters use, and the materials and construction indicate durability and reliability.
description: A compact pump-action shotgun with a wooden stock and fore-end, matte steel barrel, and ribbed pump grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, ribbed pump grip, and short steel barrel.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow profile and alignment of the stock and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same wooden and steel features, with clear visibility of the trigger guard.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the width and shape of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with tubular magazine beneath, short barrel length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
